headline: Tech Worker Emigration Reaches 18,000 Leaving Malaysia
context: Estimated 18,000 technology professionals relocated overseas in 2025 primarily to Singapore Australia and the US.

cards.big: 18,000 Malaysian tech workers emigrated in 2025 primarily to Singapore
cards.sub: Brain drain accelerates as regional salary gaps widen

cards.big: Average Singapore tech salary 2.8 times Malaysian at RM18,500 monthly
cards.sub: Entry to Singapore easiest among overseas options with minimal relocation

cards.big: Malaysian tech companies report 28% annual turnover highest among sectors
cards.sub: Companies spend RM45,000 recruiting and training each replacement

cards.big: DE Rantau visa attracted 4,200 foreign workers to replace departing talent
cards.sub: Programme criticized for bringing in workers below emigrating salary expectations

cards.big: Tech emigration tests whether Malaysia can retain talent without matching regional compensation
18,000 tech workers emigrating yearly. Talent loss at this rate erodes the workforce faster than training replaces it.
